claims.statement: Kola Superdeep Borehole depth is smaller than Hyperion tree height.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Kola Superdeep Borehole depth: 12262 m. Hyperion tree height: 115.9 m.

claims.statement: Elite sprinter top speed (approx.) is faster than Brisk walking.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Elite sprinter top speed (approx.): 45 km/h. Brisk walking: 5 km/h.

claims.statement: Channel Tunnel length is at least 6× longer than Great Wall of China length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km. Great Wall of China length: 21196 km.

claims.statement: There are fewer bones in an adult human body than keys on a standard piano.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 206 bones vs 88 keys.

viz.labelA: bones in an adult human body

claims.statement: Penicillin discovered happened before World Wide Web proposed.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Penicillin discovered: 1928. World Wide Web proposed: 1989.
